obstacle_groups.label: Top fin A — x=6..7, y=0..3, hangs from top; first obstacle in laser path at x=7
Top fin B — x=1..2, y=0..5, hangs from top-left; gap below y=6..19
Right gate A — x=9..14, y=4..5, extends from right; gap left x=0..8
Left gate A — x=0..5, y=8..9, extends from left; gap right x=6..14
Right gate B — x=8..14, y=11..12, extends from right; gap left x=0..7
Left gate B — x=0..5, y=14..15, extends from left; gap right x=6..14
Bottom fin A — x=3..4, y=16..19, rises from bottom; gap above y=0..15
Bottom fin B — x=10..11, y=16..19, rises from bottom; gap above y=0..15
